name: Murphy
message: Murphy is a family owned and operated business that manufactures and supplies a variety of engineered wood products such as softwood plywood, veneered hardwoods and panels. We did some work on their network and will show you what we got from there. Several dozen gigabytes of personal information, projects, contracts, personnel information, incidents. They don't seem very talkative for a company with a completely dead website. We'll put it all out there soon.
